data.title: CenterPoint Energy declares $0.2200 dividend per share, payable on Dec 11, 2025, to shareholders of record.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Houston, CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2200 per share for their Common Stock. This dividend is set to be paid on December 11, 2025, to shareholders holding stock as of the record date.

data.title: MedX Health names Dr. Symon Cotton as Strategic Advisor for AI & Product Development. TSXV: MDX. Leader in teledermatology.
data.description: In Mississauga, Ontario, MedX Health Corp., a prominent player in teledermatology and non-invasive skin analysis, revealed the addition of Dr. Symon D. Cotton as Strategic Advisor to the Company. Dr. Cotton, a respected medical device innovator and co-creator of SIAscopy®, brings valuable expertise to the role. He holds a position as Head of Life Sciences at a top technology firm and boasts a successful career in medical technology innovation. MedX, listed on TSXV as MDX, continues to advance with this strategic appointment.

data.title: Dragon Shield partners with Hasbro & Wizards of the Coast to create licensed MAGIC: THE GATHERING accessories.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Dragon Shield, a prominent provider of high-quality accessories for trading card games, and Hasbro's Wizards of the Coast division. This collaboration, announced on September 25, 2025 in Brabrand, Denmark, aims to create licensed accessories for the popular trading card game MAGIC: THE. Dragon Shield, known for its premium products, is set to bring their expertise to this venture, anticipating a significant impact on the TCG community.
